title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd!
